evidence: "A must see flick! Especially if action movies are a favorite!"
"Excellent action flick! A real tense, white knuckler of a movie!"
"A good popcorn flick, not something one might want to repeatedly watch."
"The story line has too much to really enjoy, but the Captain America spirit is all there!"
"Fast-paced with excellent story line! An edge of your seat ride!"
"Well scripted, excellent actors, and musical score made me forget all except living with the characters in the movie!"
"First went to the theater, then had to add it to our collection!"
"Oscar winning, surpassing ANY Disney sales ever, everyone STILL loves the movie and quotes (or sings) the lyrics...buy a copy NOW while Disney is selling it!"
"I felt these characters were really living, rather than actors."
"The script is very well written and the story line sweet as can be!"
"But you may have to get out the kleenex box though...."

summary: The user has a strong preference for action and drama films, often enjoying fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They appreciate emotional depth in storytelling, indicating a taste for engaging and well-crafted films.
